title: Turkish Crumble Potato Pie
description: A savory pie filled with potatoes, inspired by Turkish cuisine, topped with a crumble mixture for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Boil the potatoes until tender, then mash.
In a pan, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add the chopped fermented vegetables and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the mashed potatoes, onion and vegetable mixture.
Roll out the dough to fit a 9-inch pie dish.
Pour the potato mixture into the pie crust.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
